strategy: Kill the Gold Dragon first - round 1 it Shadow Sentinels itself and intercepts 75% of hits aimed at the Sultan, so it shields the boss until it is dead.
Do not Feint the Sultan - a Feint or Mass Feint makes him cleanse all his harmful wards twice. Use Indemnity, or set up traps and hit the same round.

Watch round 5 and every 5th round after: he casts a +35% Darkwind (accuracy-lowering global) then immediately Iron Sultan on the lowest-health wizard. Keep accuracy enchants up and top off your lowest wizard.
Hit with Myth - he takes 15% more from Myth and resists Storm 50%.
Do not join late; a latecomer eats a Shadow Iron Sultan hit.
cheatNotes: Join late and he interrupt-casts a Shadow Iron Sultan on the latecomer. Enter on time.
Round 1 the Gold Dragon Shadow Sentinels itself (75% intercept, -30% incoming). Kill it first or it intercepts your hits on the Sultan.
Feinting him makes him Cleanse Ward twice, stripping all his harmful wards. Skip Feint, protect it with Indemnity, or trap-and-hit the same round.
Every 5th round he casts a +35% Darkwind global that lowers your accuracy. Keep accuracy enchants on to avoid fizzles.
Right after Darkwind he casts Iron Sultan on your lowest-health wizard. Top that wizard off before round 5.
